interfaces.name: getHomepageOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview data for the homepage including featured content and today’s practice summary.

interfaces.name: searchSiteContent
interfaces.description: Global search across articles, guides, meditations, events, quizzes, and practices.

parameters.name: content_types
parameters.description: Optional filter for result types, e.g., 'article', 'guide', 'meditation_track', 'event', 'quiz', 'practice'.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Articles page, including topics, content types, and reading time range.

interfaces.name: getArticlesList
interfaces.description: List articles and guides with filters, sorting, and pagination for the Articles page.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Filter by content type, e.g., 'article' or 'guide'.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for an article or guide, including metadata and save state.

interfaces.name: getRelatedArticles
interfaces.description: Get related articles or guides for a given article to support continued reading.

interfaces.name: getContentCollectionsOverview
interfaces.description: List existing reading lists and collections for saving content (e.g., reading lists, Moon Rituals collection).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional filter for collection kind, e.g., 'reading_list' or 'collection'.

interfaces.name: createContentCollectionAndAddItem
interfaces.description: Create a new reading list or collection and add an article/guide to it in one step.

parameters.name: content_entity_type
parameters.description: Type of content to add, e.g., 'article' or 'guide'.

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: ID of the article or guide to add.

interfaces.name: addContentToExistingCollection
interfaces.description: Add an article or guide to an existing reading list or collection.

parameters.name: content_entity_type
parameters.description: Type of content to add, e.g., 'article' or 'guide'.

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: ID of the article or guide to add.

interfaces.name: getMeditationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Meditations page such as categories, duration range, and rating thresholds.

interfaces.name: getMeditationTracksList
interfaces.description: List meditation tracks with filters, sorting, and pagination.

interfaces.name: addTrackToPlaylist
interfaces.description: Add an existing meditation track to an existing playlist.

interfaces.name: createPlaylistAndAddTrack
interfaces.description: Create a new playlist and add the first meditation track to it in one step.

parameters.name: track_id
parameters.description: MeditationTrack.id to add as the first track.

interfaces.name: getPlaylistsOverview
interfaces.description: List all user-created playlists for the Playlists page.

interfaces.name: getPlaylistDetail
interfaces.description: Get a playlist with its tracks and ordering.

interfaces.name: updatePlaylistTrackOrder
interfaces.description: Update the order of tracks in a playlist.

interfaces.name: removeTrackFromPlaylist
interfaces.description: Remove a track from a playlist.

interfaces.name: renamePlaylist
interfaces.description: Rename an existing playlist.

interfaces.name: deletePlaylist
interfaces.description: Delete an existing playlist and its playlist items.

interfaces.name: getQuizzesList
interfaces.description: List all available quizzes with optional topic filtering and completion status.

interfaces.name: getQuizDetail
interfaces.description: Get quiz metadata and structured questions with answer options for taking a quiz.

interfaces.name: submitQuizAnswers
interfaces.description: Submit answers for a quiz, compute the result, and store it.

parameters.name: answers
parameters.description: Array of answers keyed by question.

interfaces.name: getRecentQuizResults
interfaces.description: Get recent quiz results for use in the Journal (e.g., quick insertion of stress level labels).

interfaces.name: getJournalEntriesList
interfaces.description: List journal entries with pagination for the Journal page.

interfaces.name: getJournalEntryDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of a single journal entry for viewing or editing.

interfaces.name: createJournalEntry
interfaces.description: Create a new journal entry.

parameters.name: source_reference_id
parameters.description: Optional reference ID such as a QuizResult.id.

interfaces.name: updateJournalEntry
interfaces.description: Update an existing journal entry.

interfaces.name: deleteJournalEntry
interfaces.description: Delete a journal entry.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Events & Workshops such as time-of-day segments and default date range.

interfaces.name: getEventsList
interfaces.description: List upcoming events/workshops with keyword search, filters, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Free-text search in titles and descriptions, e.g., 'Breathwork for Anxiety'.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter events starting on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter events on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: time_of_day_segment
parameters.description: Filter by time of day, e.g., 'evening'.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of an event or workshop including schedule and description.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register the current user for an event/workshop with name, email, and time zone.

interfaces.name: getAffirmationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Affirmations such as tags.

interfaces.name: getAffirmationsList
interfaces.description: List affirmations with optional tag filtering and pagination.

interfaces.name: getAffirmationSetsOverview
interfaces.description: List all user-defined affirmation sets.

interfaces.name: createAffirmationSetAndAddItem
interfaces.description: Create a new affirmation set and add the first affirmation to it.

parameters.name: affirmation_id
parameters.description: Affirmation.id to add as the first item.

interfaces.name: addAffirmationToExistingSet
interfaces.description: Add an affirmation to an existing affirmation set.

interfaces.name: getAffirmationSetDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific affirmation set, including its affirmations and schedule.

interfaces.name: updateAffirmationSetSchedule
interfaces.description: Configure reminder or schedule settings for an affirmation set.

parameters.name: schedule_time
parameters.description: Time of day in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format, e.g., '07:00'.

interfaces.name: removeAffirmationFromSet
interfaces.description: Remove an affirmation from a set.

interfaces.name: getChallengeFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Challenges & Programs such as tags, durations, and difficulty levels.

interfaces.name: getChallengesList
interfaces.description: List challenges/programs with filters, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: duration_days
parameters.description: Filter by challenge duration in days, e.g., 3.

interfaces.name: getChallengeDetail
interfaces.description: Get details of a specific challenge/program, including its structure and description.

interfaces.name: enrollInChallenge
interfaces.description: Join a challenge and set the chosen start date.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Challenge start date (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., upcoming Monday.

interfaces.name: getPracticeFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Practices & Yoga such as difficulty, intention, and duration range.

interfaces.name: getPracticesList
interfaces.description: List practices/yoga sequences with filters, sorting, and pagination.

interfaces.name: getPracticeDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific practice, including steps, equipment, and ratings.

interfaces.name: addPracticeToTodaysPractice
interfaces.description: Add a practice to the Today's Practice plan, creating today's plan if needed.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Plan date (YYYY-MM-DD). If omitted, defaults to today.

interfaces.name: getTodaysPracticeSummary
interfaces.description: Get the Today's Practice plan and its items for a given date (default today).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Plan date (YYYY-MM-DD). If omitted, defaults to today.

interfaces.name: updateTodaysPracticeOrder
interfaces.description: Reorder items in a Today's Practice plan.

interfaces.name: updateTodaysPracticeItemCompletion
interfaces.description: Mark a practice item in Today's Practice as completed or not completed.

interfaces.name: removeTodaysPracticeItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the Today's Practice plan.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, creator introduction, and guidance on using the site.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get information needed to render the Contact page, such as default contact email and response expectations.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a contact/feedback message from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyAndTermsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Privacy & Terms page, including data usage and disclaimers.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateTodaysPracticePlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or create the TodaysPracticePlan for a given date.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePlaylist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or create a default playlist structure when adding tracks.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateContentCollection
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or create a content collection (reading list/collection) by name and kind.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateQuizResultFromAnswers
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute a QuizResult, including score and overall_label, from submitted answers.

helperFunctions.name: _applyListPaginationAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply consistent pagination and sorting behavior across list endpoints.
